title: Shorthand rule kinds desugaring to JSON Schema
description:
Desugar the shorthand rule kinds (require-label, require-section, require-doc-type) into JSON Schema over the projection.

## Background

Shorthands keep common rules to one line while the engine retains a single validator underneath. Each shorthand must compile to equivalent JSON Schema. See `dev/active/f6a704d0-validation-engine-plan.md` (step 4) and decision record sections 4.1 and 5.2.

## Success Criteria

- [ ] [hard] `validation/desugar.rs` converts `require-label {label, min, max}` into a JSON Schema constraining `labels.<ns>` cardinality.
- [ ] [hard] `require-section {heading}` desugars to a schema asserting `sections.<heading>` exists and is non-empty.
- [ ] [hard] `require-doc-type {doc_type}` desugars to a schema asserting `doc_types` contains the value.
- [ ] [hard] Each desugaring is unit-tested against an equivalent hand-written JSON Schema (identical accept/reject behavior).

## Notes

Builds on the projection shape and the validation core's evaluation primitive.
